Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to create an accepting Petri net using the pm4py library in Python This net must model a specific insurance claim management process involving sequential steps conditional branches and loops

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Scenario Start New claim arrives Step 1 Claim Registration CR Step 2 Document Verification DV Loop If incomplete Re Document Submission RDS Back to DV Step 3 Fraud Check FC Loop If doubts In depth Investigation II multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA Step 4 Claim Assessment CA Step 5 Approval AP Step 6 Payment P Step 7 Notification N Step 8 Closure CL End Final marking

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Interpretation FC checks If doubts go to II After II go back to FC to check again If clear go to CA This can happen multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Petri Net Structure Design Places start after CR after DV after RDS after FC after II after CA after AP after P after N end Transitions CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL Arcs start CR CR after CR after CR DV DV after DV after DV RDS RDS after RDS DV after DV FC

Name: Backtracking - NE
Text: Correction Standard PN logic for a loop DV RDS DV usually requires a place between DV and RDS and a place between RDS and DV Refined Loop Logic p dv entry DV p dv out p dv out RDS p rds out p rds out p dv entry To allow Proceed vs Re submit We need an XOR split conceptually

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Compromise I will structure it linearly with the loop explicitly defined via arcs DV Place Check DV Place Check DV RDS Place DV Entry Place Check DV FC This allows the token to go to RDS OR FC This represents the choice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Addressing the Approval Threshold nuance The claim must be approved if the amount surpasses a certain threshold This implies a conditional branch Decision I will model it as a sequence CA AP P Why Because modeling a split requires an XOR gateway which is a transition in basic PN logic To keep it clean and aligned with the prompts request for transitions labeled with activity names

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refining the Logic Loops DV RDS p dv start DV p dv end p dv end RDS p dv start p dv end p fc start FC II Loop p fc in FC p fc decision p fc decision II p fc in p fc decision CA Linear p ca CA p ap p ap AP p p p p P p n p n N p end p end CL end

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refinement on Loop Logic If p dv has arcs to RDS and FC DV p dv p dv RDS RDS p dv p dv FC This creates a choice at p dv For FC II DV p fc input II p fc input p fc input FC FC p fc output p fc output CA p fc output II II p fc input This works perfectly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Implementation Details Import PetriNet Marking petri utils Create PetriNet object Create Place objects add to net places Create Transition objects with labels add to net transitions Use petri utils add arc from to Create im Token in start Create fm Token in end Cleanup remove end place from net and fm like the example

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verification Does it compile Mental check Are imports correct pm4py objects petri net obj pm4py objects petri net utils petri utils Is Marking used correctly im place 1 Is the loop logic sound Yes Is the example pattern followed Yes Final Review of the Prompt Requirements Accepting Petri Net Initial Final Marking Scenario Insurance Claim Specific Steps CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL Loops DV RDS FC II Code Python using pm4py Cleanup Remove sink place
